infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NextSport needs camera access to record your swing videos for AI analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NextSport needs microphone access to record audio with your swing videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NextSport needs access to your photo library to upload existing swing videos for analysis.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NextSport to access your camera to record swing videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NextSport to access your microphone for video recording.
